findings.evidence: `FundamentalGroupOpposite.lean:153-154` has `[SimplyConnectedSpace E] [PreconnectedSpace E]`; Mathlib defines `SimplyConnectedSpace.PathConnectedSpace` at `AlgebraicTopology/FundamentalGroupoid/SimplyConnected.lean:64`, and existing `FundamentalGroup.lean:72-75` already calls `hreg.isQuotientCoveringMap hp` without an explicit `[PreconnectedSpace E]`.
findings.fix: Remove the explicit `[PreconnectedSpace E]` argument and let typeclass search infer the connectedness needed by `deckEquivFiber`.
findings.issue: `deckEquivFiber_eq_fundamentalGroupEquivFiber` assumes both `[SimplyConnectedSpace E]` and `[PreconnectedSpace E]`, but `SimplyConnectedSpace` already supplies connectedness, so this exposes a stronger-than-needed signature.

summary: One added theorem carries a redundant connectedness assumption; the opposite-direction API otherwise sits at the same level as the existing regular-cover comparison.
